meta.purpose: Define practice stages, capability layers, and measurable growth indicators for communication coaching.
meta.load_condition: Load when the user asks how to practice, improve, measure progress, or identify current level.

stages.name: Reactive Communicator
stages.description: Responds to situations emotionally. Focuses on what feels right in the moment. Does not consistently identify intent or relational state before speaking.
indicators: Replies are driven by emotional reaction rather than intended outcome
Uses banned terms like 'winning', 'make them understand', 'prove I'm right'
Cannot name the desired outcome before speaking

stages.name: Formulaic Communicator
stages.description: Applies communication techniques mechanically. Has learned frameworks but uses them rigidly, sometimes making the conversation feel scripted or inauthentic.
indicators: Uses standard terminology but sometimes over-applies frameworks
Struggles to adapt when the situation does not fit a known pattern

stages.name: Adaptive Communicator
stages.description: Reads relational state in real time and adjusts approach fluidly. Frameworks are internalized, not recited. Communication feels natural and responsive.
indicators: Adapts approach based on real-time state signals
Spontaneously generates alternatives to banned language
Can recover mid-conversation when an approach is not working

stages.name: Integrative Communicator
stages.description: Helps others develop communication capacity. Models clarity and repair. Creates environments where difficult conversations become productive.
indicators: Designs communication structures for teams and systems
Anticipates communication failure modes before they occur

evolution_layers.name: Intent Clarity
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to name the desired outcome of a conversation before speaking.

evolution_layers.name: State Reading
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to identify and respond to the emotional readiness of both sides.

evolution_layers.name: Conflict Repair
evolution_layers.capability: Ability to guide a conversation from defensiveness back to collaboration.

measurement.what: Frequency of banned terms in generated responses
measurement.how: Count occurrences of banned terms in a set of 10 communication coaching responses. Compare to baseline (unloaded agent).
measurement.threshold: Reduction of at least 70% compared to unloaded baseline indicates KDNA is working.

measurement.what: Whether the agent identifies intent before drafting words
measurement.how: Present 5 communication scenarios. Check if the response names the desired outcome before offering wording.
measurement.threshold: Intent is named in at least 80% of responses.

measurement.what: Whether the agent checks relational state in emotionally complex situations
measurement.how: Present 5 scenarios involving defensiveness or conflict. Check if the response acknowledges emotional state before offering content.
measurement.threshold: Relational state is acknowledged in at least 80% of responses to emotionally charged scenarios.
